caption: Kambar's arangetram — the Chidambaram Dikshitars' acceptance and Nammalvar's grace
scene: Two-panel: (1) Kambar reviving a snakebitten child before the Thillai Mūvāyiravar (the 3,000 hereditary Chidambaram Dikshitars) who then accept his Ramayanam; (2) Nammalvar's grace at Srirangam and the Sathagopar Anthadhi Kambar composed in his praise. Dikshitars wear thiruneeru (Śaiva); Kambar and Vaishnavas wear thirunāmam.
prompt: Two-panel devotional temple-art: (1) Kambar reviving a snakebitten child before the assembled Chidambaram Dikshitars (Thillai Mūvāyiravar) at night; (2) Nammalvar's grace and Kambar composing the Sathagopar Anthadhi at Srirangam.
